warnings: Outdated dependency warnings were reported by lint.

MainActivity still contains static placeholder fishing content instead of a real production workflow.

notes: Release APK installed successfully after uninstalling an older differently signed package.
Launch smoke test succeeded with no immediate crash reported by `adb shell monkey`.
The captured log window did not show an immediate app crash attributed to `com.maxxed.fishingmaxxed`.
Mandatory product validation could not be completed because the production fishing and regulation features are not implemented.

blockingIssues: No real capture or known-reference fish measurement workflow is implemented.
No species catalog, confirmation, or full journal management workflow exists.
No private exact-location storage/redaction pipeline exists.
No California rule engine, rule-package management, freshness handling, or rollback support exists.
No privacy enforcement exists for the intended export and regulation workflows.
No permission-denial and recovery experience exists for the required camera/location workflow.
readyStatement: Blocked. Signed artifacts and a basic launch smoke test exist, but the current build remains a scaffold and does not satisfy the required production feature gate for Play internal testing.
